ogTitle: Ben Lomond vs Bendalong: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ben Lomond and Bendalong.
heading: Ben Lomond vs Bendalong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ben Lomond, New South Wales and Bendalong, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ben Lomond has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Bendalong (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ben Lomond or Bendalong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ben Lomond has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Bendalong scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ben Lomond scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Bendalong scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ben Lomond or Bendalong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ben Lomond has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
